title: Infosys Recognized as Leader in Forrester AI Technical Services Report
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that it was recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: AI Technical Services, Q4 2025. The release highlights Infosys being ranked second highest in the strategy category and cites strengths in frontier AI models, AI workload optimization, edge/IoT integration, AI lifecycle management, talent strategy, and global delivery strategy.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was recognized as a Leader in the inaugural edition of The Forrester Wave™: AI Technical Services, Q4 2025.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Recognized as a Leader in Inaugural AI Technical Services, Q4 2025 Analyst Report

key_facts.fact: Infosys was ranked second highest in the strategy category.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Recognized as a Leader in Inaugural AI Technical Services, Q4 2025 Analyst Report

key_facts.fact: Infosys earned 5/5 scores in criteria such as Talent Strategy, Global Delivery Strategy, Frontier Model, and AI Workloads Optimized for Infrastructure.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Recognized as a Leader in Inaugural AI Technical Services, Q4 2025 Analyst Report

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, today announced that it has been recognized as a Leader in the inaugural edition of The Forrester Wave™: AI Technical Services, Q4 2025.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Recognized as a Leader in Inaugural AI Technical Services, Q4 2025 Analyst Report

important_text_spans.text: The company earned 5/5 scores in criteria such as Talent Strategy, Global Delivery Strategy, Frontier Model, and AI Workloads Optimized for Infrastructure.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Recognized as a Leader in Inaugural AI Technical Services, Q4 2025 Analyst Report
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the specific AI capability areas highlighted in the recognition.
